context: Tests an ArticleCardView UIView subclass for correct Dynamic Type support, dark mode semantic colors, trait change registration using the modern iOS 17+ API, VoiceOver accessibility properties, and a retain-cycle-free CADisplayLink shimmer animation via the weak proxy pattern.

checklist.name: Dynamic Type font API
checklist.description: Title and summary labels use UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle:) — not UIFont(name:size:) or UIFont.systemFont(ofSize:) with a hardcoded size

checklist.name: adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory
checklist.description: Both labels have adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory set to true

checklist.name: Semantic text colors
checklist.description: Labels use semantic colors such as .label, .secondaryLabel, or .tertiaryLabel — NOT UIColor(red:green:blue:alpha:) or fixed color constants

checklist.name: Semantic background color
checklist.description: The card view or container uses a semantic background color such as .systemBackground, .secondarySystemBackground, or .tertiarySystemBackground — NOT a hardcoded white or black UIColor

checklist.name: CGColor re-resolved on trait change
checklist.description: Any CALayer border color (CGColor) is re-resolved inside a trait-change handler — not only set once at initialization

checklist.name: registerForTraitChanges used
checklist.description: Trait changes are registered via registerForTraitChanges(_:handler:) or registerForTraitChanges(_:target:action:) — the file does NOT contain traitCollectionDidChange

checklist.name: No traitCollectionDidChange override
checklist.description: The file does NOT override traitCollectionDidChange — only the modern registerForTraitChanges API is present

checklist.name: accessibilityLabel set
checklist.description: accessibilityLabel is set on the card view (or its labels are grouped under the card as an accessibility element)

checklist.name: accessibilityTraits set
checklist.description: accessibilityTraits is explicitly set on the card view or a custom element (e.g., .staticText, .button, or a combined trait)

checklist.name: accessibilityHint set
checklist.description: accessibilityHint is set on the card view or custom element to describe the available action

checklist.name: Weak proxy for CADisplayLink
checklist.description: CADisplayLink is NOT created with target: self directly on ArticleCardView. Instead a separate weak-proxy object (a class that holds a weak reference to the card view) is used as the CADisplayLink target
